scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w packages/gateway && npm run build -w packages/worker && npm run build -w packages/persistence
scripts.build:gateway: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w packages/gateway
scripts.build:worker: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w packages/worker
scripts.dev: npm run build && npm run start
scripts.restart: pkill -f 'buddy-(gateway|worker|persistence)' 2>/dev/null; sleep 2; pkill -9 -f 'buddy-(gateway|worker|persistence)' 2>/dev/null; sleep 1; rm -f /tmp/buddy/*.sock data/gateway.pid; npm install && npm run build && npm run start
